hero.subtitle: Home care in Belgium
hero.description: Our team serves Overijse, Hoeilaart and Tervuren with professionalism and compassion, at every step of your recovery.
hero.imageAlt: Smiling nurse caring for an elderly lady at home

trustBar.label: All Belgian Health Insurance
trustBar.sublabel: Agreement with all Belgian health insurance funds

servicesSection.label: Medical expertise
servicesSection.title: Our care services
servicesSection.subtitle: Medical expertise tailored to every situation.

soins-generaux.name: General home nursing care
soins-generaux.description: Daily basic care: dressings, injections, infusions, blood pressure monitoring. Everything you need, at home.
soins-generaux.heroTitle: General home nursing care in Belgium
soins-generaux.heroSubtitle: Hospital-quality daily care in the comfort of your home. Dressings, injections, infusions, monitoring: we take care of you every day.

troubles-memoire.name: Memory disorder care
troubles-memoire.description: Specialised support for patients with Alzheimer's or cognitive impairments, with a gentle and patient approach.
troubles-memoire.heroTitle: Home nursing care for memory disorders
troubles-memoire.heroSubtitle: A gentle and expert presence for patients with Alzheimer's or cognitive impairments. We accompany with patience, kindness and professionalism.

interventions-rapides.name: Rapid nursing interventions
interventions-rapides.description: Immediate availability for urgent home care: we can be with you within the hour if needed.
interventions-rapides.heroSubtitle: Immediate availability for your urgent needs. Our nurses can intervene within the hour in Overijse, Hoeilaart and Tervuren.

suivi-long-terme.name: Long-term nursing follow-up
suivi-long-terme.description: A stable team that follows you over time, with the same reference nurse for true continuity of care.
suivi-long-terme.heroSubtitle: A lasting relationship of trust. The same reference nurse, a stable team and seamless medical coordination for your long-term health.

maladies-chroniques.name: Chronic disease management
maladies-chroniques.description: Diabetes, hypertension, COPD, heart failure: daily management and therapeutic education.
maladies-chroniques.heroTitle: Home nursing care for chronic diseases
maladies-chroniques.heroSubtitle: Diabetes, hypertension, COPD, heart failure: expert management at home. Therapeutic education, continuous monitoring and real-time adjustments.

soins-seniors.name: Elderly care
soins-seniors.description: Remaining at home, fall prevention, hygiene care and comprehensive geriatric support.
soins-seniors.heroTitle: Home nursing care for the elderly
soins-seniors.heroSubtitle: Staying at home, preserving independence and quality geriatric care. Because everyone deserves to age with dignity in their own environment.

soins-palliatifs.name: Palliative care at home
soins-palliatifs.description: Comfort, dignity and human presence for end-of-life patients and their loved ones.
soins-palliatifs.heroTitle: Palliative care at home in Belgium
soins-palliatifs.heroSubtitle: Comfort, dignity and human presence for end-of-life patients and their families. Accompanying to the end, at home, surrounded by loved ones.

post-hospitalisation.name: Post-hospitalisation home care
post-hospitalisation.description: Peaceful recovery after an operation: dressings, rehabilitation, monitoring and medical coordination.
post-hospitalisation.heroSubtitle: Safe return home after an operation or hospitalisation. Medical coordination, wound monitoring, complication surveillance and gradual rehabilitation.

zonesSection.label: Service area
zonesSection.title: We serve your municipality
zonesSection.subtitle: We serve the municipalities of Overijse, Hoeilaart and Tervuren
zonesSection.overijse: Daily visits throughout the municipality and surrounding hamlets.
zonesSection.hoeilaart: Full coverage of Hoeilaart and adjacent residential areas.
zonesSection.tervuren: Regular presence in Tervuren, Vossem and Sint-Joris-Weert.
zonesSection.neighborsQuestion: Do you live in a neighbouring village?
zonesSection.neighborsText: to check if we serve your area.

processSection.label: How it works
processSection.title: As simple as a phone call
processSection.subtitle: From your first call to the start of care, we guide every step with clarity.
processSection.step1Desc: Call us, send a WhatsApp or fill in the online form. We respond within 2 hours.
processSection.step2Desc: A nurse visits you free of charge to assess your needs and draw up a personalised care plan.
processSection.step3Desc: We start your care according to your schedule. Full flexibility, 7/7, with continuous follow-up.

ctaSection.title: Need home care today?
ctaSection.subtitle: Our team is reachable 7 days a week, from 7am to 8pm on weekdays and from 8am to 6pm at weekends. Response within 2 hours guaranteed.

footer.tagline: Professional nursing care at home in Belgium

contactPage.heroSubtitle: We respond within 2 hours. Available Monday to Sunday.
contactPage.formSubtitle: All fields marked with a * are required.
contactPage.emergencyTitle: Need urgent care? Call us directly.
contactPage.emergencyText: For any life-threatening emergency, call 112 immediately. For urgent non-vital care, our team responds within the hour.

aboutPage.heroTitle: A team of nurses at the service of your health
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: We are healthcare professionals passionate about home care, committed to the residents of Overijse, Hoeilaart and Tervuren.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Every situation is unique. Contact us for a free, no-obligation conversation with a nurse from our team.

servicesPage.ctaTitle: Do you have a specific need?
servicesPage.ctaSubtitle: Every situation is unique. Contact us for a free, no-obligation conversation — we will assess the most appropriate care together.

zonesPage.heroSubtitle: Our nurses visit homes in Overijse, Hoeilaart and Tervuren — in French, Dutch and English.
zonesPage.mapLabel: Map of the 3 service areas: Overijse, Hoeilaart, Tervuren
zonesPage.sectionSubtitle: Each municipality has its own characteristics. Discover our presence and commitments in each area.
zonesPage.outOfZoneSubtitle: We also cover neighbouring municipalities and assess each request on a case-by-case basis. Contact us to check if we can serve your area.

servicePage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today. We respond within 2 hours and arrange a free assessment at your home.

items.q: Do I need a medical prescription to use your services?
items.a: For procedures reimbursed by your health insurance (dressings, injections, infusions), a medical prescription is required. For comfort care or an initial assessment, you can contact us directly without a prescription.
For standard requests, we respond within 2 hours and schedule a visit within 24-48 hours. For urgent cases, we respond within the hour subject to availability.
Our care is agreed and reimbursed by all Belgian health insurance funds. Your personal contribution depends on your status. We will inform you of fees before any intervention.
Yes, 7 days a week, including Saturday and Sunday. Our hours are 7am-8pm on weekdays and 8am-6pm at weekends.

items.q: What happens at the first visit?
items.a: The first visit is a free, no-obligation assessment. A nurse visits you at home to assess your needs, answer your questions and draw up a personalised care plan.
